content.en:
Hurricane Capital.

The Great Ancestor of the Ape Leopard came back from injury, and hid in the Remnant Heaven Pavilion of Guidu Mountain for the first time.

And after Fengyin Great Ancestor found out, he immediately came over.

"Ape Leopard Ancestor, are you injured? Which high-ranking Ancestor of the Hurricane Collar have you fought against?"

"It's that Xuan Ming Great Ancestor!"

The Great Ancestor of the Ape Leopard said with some shame.

"What, it's !! him" Fengyin Great Ancestor was shocked, how could this be possible, Xuan Ming Great Ancestor was only a middle-level immeasurable lifeform, how could he beat the Ape and Leopard Great Ancestor?

"It's true!" The Great Ancestor of the Ape and Leopard said: "That Great Ancestor of the Xuan Ming is very powerful, not only has he cultivated a superior immeasurable body, but he is also close to the realm of Dacheng, and he has also comprehended the Infinite Extreme Dao, and his body is no less powerful than the top mid-level immeasurable lifeform that has recast his life nine times. And his foundation is terrifying, far beyond his peers!"

"How could such a demonic mid-level immeasurable lifeform come from the Hopeless Land? It should only be able to be cultivated by the most terrifying forces in the Xuanqi Realm!"

Fengyin Great Ancestor frowned.

Soon, Fengyin Great Ancestor hurriedly said: "You have to leave the Hurricane Capital quickly, and this matter must have offended the Xuanming Great Ancestor, and it is not a good thing to provoke such a demonic genius!"

"It should be very simple for us to get rid of the Xuanming Great Ancestor in the Remnant Heaven Pavilion!"

"It's really simple, but the Remnant Heaven Pavilion won't offend such a great ancestor, what if he has a background, such as a powerful master. Even if he didn't have a strong background, letting him escape would bring a powerful enemy to the Remnant Sky Pavilion. Therefore, the top high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion would not make a move. Fengyin Great Ancestor said.

"I know!"

The Great Ancestor of the Ape and Leopard didn't continue to say anything, and immediately left directly.

......

Ye Tian did not go to trouble the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, but returned to the residence of the Hurricane Capital and continued to retreat and practice.

He only injured the Great Ancestor of the Ape and Leopard this time, and it was not a real conflict with the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, and it was unlikely that the Remnant Heaven Pavilion would retaliate against him, and he would not send the Great Ancestor to spy on him again.

If the Remnant Heaven Pavilion really made a fool and dared to make a move, it would be the Remnant Heaven Pavilion dead.

Without the high-level immeasurable lifeforms secretly snooping, there would be no risk of exposure when Ye Tian intersected with other replicating bodies.

Another period of time passed, and Ye Tian consumed a lot of refined golden dragon stones, and finally completed the seventh life reforge, and his strength improved again.

And this time the increase is even greater, beyond previous imagination.

"The different golden sand formula is reforged for life, and the more times it is reforged, the more terrifying the increased strength becomes. If I wait for ten life reforges, I'm afraid I really have the strength to kill ordinary high-level immeasurable lifeforms!" Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, his current immeasurable will has surpassed more than 400, reaching the level of 480 scales, which is not far from the 500 scales required to impact high-level immeasurable life forms.

With his current strength, he could easily defeat the Great Ancestor of the Ape Leopard.

this day.

When Ye Tian was practicing, the Golden Glass Ancestor came to visit.

Ye Tian has been in the hurricane capital for so long, and the Golden Glass Ancestor has known it for a long time, and he has been here a few times, but Ye Tian and the Golden Glass Ancestor have not had much intersection.

"Jinli Great Ancestor, what are you looking for me?"

Ye Tian asked.

At this time, the Golden Glass Ancestor smiled and said, "Xuanming Ancestor, this time is a good thing!"

"Good thing?"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled, and he didn't know what the good thing the Golden Glass Ancestor said.

Immediately after, the Golden Glass Great Ancestor revealed: "Xuan Ming Great Ancestor, the Hurricane Pavilion has revealed the news to the outside world, and is preparing to recruit a large number of mid-level immeasurable lifeforms, preparing to take the initiative against a tyrant of the Voidless Galaxy. All the great ancestors who have made contributions in this great war can exchange their merits for the resources of life recasting in the Hurricane Pavilion - Hurricane Stone! Or they can choose to join the Hurricane Pavilion, no matter what the case is, it is a great opportunity! This news has just been released, I have come to you, and we will join forces to take care of it!"

From the point of view of the Golden Glass Great Ancestor, Ye Tian must be very excited, after all, Ye Tian has not joined any forces, and he definitely does not have the resources to reforge his life!

However, the Golden Glass Great Ancestor didn't know at all that Ye Tian had already completed seven life reforges, and he was still using the Isojinsha formula to carry out life reforges, even the Hurricane Pavilion did not have such conditions.

"Hurricane Pavilion is the first of the Void Galaxy's overlords, and they want to die?"

Ye Tian was quite shocked.

As for the benefits given by the Hurricane Pavilion, he can't look down on it!

"I don't know the reason, but a force like the Hurricane Pavilion must be sure of it! Although there is danger, such an opportunity is hard to come by!"

"Jinli Great Ancestor, I'm not interested, so I won't participate!"

Ye Tian directly refused.

The Golden Glass Ancestor still wanted to persuade him, but Ye Tian had no interest in cooperating at all, and in the end he left.

After the Golden Glass Ancestor left, Ye Tian still went to inquire about the news, after all, he wanted to know the reason for such a big thing.

Finally, after inquiring about how convenient it was, Ye Tian learned the reason.

It turns out that a certain area of the Voidless Galaxy is about to usher in a specific convergence period, and during the convergence period, the other overlords of the Voidless Galaxy will naturally not be able to enter, and there will be no reinforcements.

As long as you grasp the timing during the confluence, you can enter the area of the Voidless Galaxy, and then enter the confluence period range together.

At that time, the only opponent of the Hurricane Tower will be the overlord.

As long as the overlord is killed, the overlord's territory and resources will belong to the Hurricane Tower.

If there was no intersection period, even if the Hurricane Building was ten times more powerful than ten or dozens of times, it would not dare to do it, but the intersection period gave the Hurricane Building hope.

As for why he took the initiative against that tyrant, this involves an interest.

"Hailou Jin!"

This material is a resource needed by high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and it is extremely rare, only available in the Voidless Galaxy, and even if it can be found in the Voidless Galaxy, it cannot be found, and it is controlled by those overlords.

Those overlords have countless subordinates, and they have already collected the sea tower gold of the Voidless Galaxy.

And the overlord that the Hurricane Pavilion was going to deal with not only had a lot of sea gold, but even a huge mineral vein, so the Hurricane Pavilion had a mind about it.

"There should be more than one force in the Hurricane Pavilion to do it, but no matter how many forces do it, it will definitely suffer heavy losses in the end, and those middle-level immeasurable lifeforms are cannon fodder!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Those middle-level immeasurable lifeforms also knew their own fate as cannon fodder, but they also had to take risks for the sake of chance.

The Golden Glass Ancestor was also afraid of danger, so he kept looking for the Great Ancestor to cooperate, so that by joining forces, the hope of survival would be greater.

"Hailou Jin, I will definitely be able to be a high-level immeasurable lifeform in the future, I have to participate in it this time, if I get some Hailou Jin, it would be great!" Ye Tian thought.

As for looking for Hailou Jin by himself, there is no hope, because it is occupied by the overlords.

He was ready to take advantage of the fact that the overlord was fighting with the major forces, and he would take the opportunity to seize Hailou Jin.
